scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,pwa "npm run dev -w @olivia/api" "npm run dev -w @olivia/pwa"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @olivia/contracts && npm run build -w @olivia/domain && npm run build -w @olivia/api && npm run build -w @olivia/pwa
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @olivia/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @olivia/domain && npm run typecheck -w @olivia/api && npm run typecheck -w @olivia/pwa
scripts.test: npm run test:domain && npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e
